base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of flame_mammoth_stage — a tile from 1993 mega man x. Flame Mammoth Stage — foundry. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Flame Mammoth Stage — foundry; Ride Armor debut
